---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, check, or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What governance question or pain point is this solving? (e.g. "I can't tell which skills exist on
codex but not on claude.")

**Proposed solution**
What command / flag / check would address it, and roughly what its output would look like.

**Read or write?**
harness-mgr is read-mostly and dry-run-by-default. If this writes, describe how it should stay
reversible (snapshot/rollback) and gated.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've already tried or ruled out.
